References

[1]

M. Pohlen and I. Trujillo. The structure of galactic disks. Studying late-type spiral galaxies using SDSS. \aap , 454(3):759–772, August 2006. arXiv:astro-ph/0603682, doi:10.1051/0004-6361:20064883.

[2]

Peter Erwin, Michael Pohlen, and John E. Beckman. The Outer Disks of Early-Type Galaxies. I. Surface-Brightness Profiles of Barred Galaxies. \aj , 135(1):20–54, January 2008. arXiv:0709.3505, doi:10.1088/0004-6256/135/1/20.

[3]

Robert C. Kennicutt, Jr. The Star Formation Law in Galactic Disks. \apj , 344:685, September 1989. doi:10.1086/167834.

[4]

Victor P. Debattista, Lucio Mayer, C. Marcella Carollo, Ben Moore, James Wadsley, and Thomas Quinn. The Secular Evolution of Disk Structural Parameters. \apj , 645(1):209–227, July 2006. arXiv:astro-ph/0509310, doi:10.1086/504147.

[5]

Alejandro Borlaff, M. Carmen Eliche-Moral, Cristina Rodríguez-Pérez, Miguel Querejeta, Trinidad Tapia, Pablo G. Pérez-González, Jaime Zamorano, Jesús Gallego, and John Beckman. Formation of S0 galaxies through mergers. Antitruncated stellar discs resulting from major mergers. \aap , 570:A103, October 2014. arXiv:1407.5097, doi:10.1051/0004-6361/201424299.

[6]

Joel C. Roediger, Stéphane Courteau, Patricia Sánchez-Blázquez, and Michael McDonald. Stellar Populations and Radial Migrations in Virgo Disk Galaxies. \apj , 758(1):41, October 2012. arXiv:1201.6361, doi:10.1088/0004-637X/758/1/41.
